personal.name: Joakim Moléni
personal.title: Software Engineer — Platform, Integration & Technical Delivery

profile: Engineer with a systems-level perspective shaped by banking, backend development and operational leadership. Strong at connecting old and new technology, turning ambiguous requirements into workable architecture and keeping delivery grounded in reliability.

highlights: Working in high-reliability banking flows where mainframe logic and distributed services need to align cleanly
Contributing to architecture and implementation decisions across transaction-heavy production systems
Improving maintainability and delivery confidence in regulated infrastructure
Backend and systems work across Linux environments, APIs and core banking integrations
Hands-on support for service behaviour, operational issues and system-level troubleshooting
Built decision-making discipline, ownership and delivery focus that now inform technical work
Experience leading teams, priorities and outcomes in environments where execution mattered

projects.name: Portfolio & Resume Builder
projects.description: A lightweight personal site with role-specific resume variants, print support and minimal client-side logic.

projects.name: Core-to-Cloud Integration Work
projects.description: Production-facing work connecting stable transactional systems to newer service layers without losing reliability along the way.
